case_title: MARIA BEDOLLA VS. MONSANTO COMPANY ET AL

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ADDITION OF CASE TO JCCP AND STAY OF CASE (TRANSACTION ID # 64834763) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BEDOLLA, MARIA INDIVIDUALLY AND AS SUCCESSOR IN INTREST TO THE ESTATE OF DAVID R BEDOLLA, DECEASED
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-04-2019 CONTINUED TO APR-01-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-05-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. CASE COORDINATED WITH JCCP 4953. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
